commands.title: Starter Food
commands.description:
Essential emergency rations for exploration.

Learning Points:
• Bread restores 5 hunger points
• Stacks up to 64
• Can be crafted from wheat in survival
commands.syntaxBreakdown:
1. /give: Item generation.
2. @p: Nearest player targeting.
3. bread: The item string ID.
4. 64: Maximum stack count.

commands.title: /recipe
commands.description: Unlocks or removes crafting recipes for players.

commands.title: /clearspawnpoint
commands.description: Resets a player's spawn point to the world default.
